name: multi-agent-sdlc-crew
description: Hook-gated multi-agent SDLC profile with a Node.js hook runtime that enforces discover -> design -> implement -> verify -> review -> docs, plus footer, specialist-role, and verification contracts.

enforcement_mode.title: Command policy enforcement mode
enforcement_mode.description: advisory (default) logs dangerous-intent without blocking; enforce denies dangerous commands and fails closed on unparseable input. Any other value is treated as advisory by the runtime.
